    FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION f

उन दस परिवारों की आईडी और सामाजिक समूह श्रेणियों की सूची बनाएं जिन्होंने चावल, गेहूं और दाल जैसी मुख्य खाद्य वस्तुओं पर सबसे अधिक कुल व्यय किया है।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T2.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY, (T1.CONSUMPTION_RICE_EXPENDITURE_RS + T1.CONSUMPTION_WHEAT_EXPENDITURE_RS + T1.CONSUMPTION_PULSES_EXPENDITURE_RS) FROM FACT_FOOD_CONSUMPTION AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID ORDER BY (T1.CONSUMPTION_RICE_EXPENDITURE_RS + T1.CONSUMPTION_WHEAT_EXPENDITURE_RS + T1.CONSUMPTION_PULSES_EXPENDITURE_RS) DESC LIMIT 10
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    h.HOUSEHOLD_ID,
    h.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY,
    SUM(f.CONSUMPTION_RICE_EXPENDITURE_RS + f.CONSUMPTION_WHEAT_EXPENDITURE_RS + f.CONSUMPTION_PULSES_EXPENDITURE_RS) AS total_expenditure
FROM 
    DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL h
JOIN 
    FACT_FOOD_CONSUMPTION f ON h.HOUSEHOLD_ID = f.HOUSEHOLD_ID
GROUP BY 
    h.HOUSEHOLD_ID, h.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY
ORDER BY 
    total_expenditure DESC
LIMIT 10;
